sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: SM ENERGY CLOSES MERGER WITH CIVITAS RESOURCES
feed.summary: SM Energy (NYSE: SM) announced the closing of its all-stock merger with Civitas Resources (NYSE: CIVI) after approval from stockholders of both companies. The combined entity will retain the SM Energy name and ticker symbol "SM," with Beth McDonald appointed as President and CEO. The company anticipates achieving $200-300 million in annual synergies and divesting at least $1.0 billion over the next year to strengthen its balance sheet and accelerate returns to stockholders.

feed.title: Donaldson names COO Richard Lewis as new CEO effective March By Investing.com
feed.summary: Donaldson Company, Inc. has announced the appointment of COO Richard Lewis as its new President and CEO, effective March 2, 2026. Lewis will succeed Tod Carpenter, who is transitioning to executive chairman. The company, which specializes in filtration products, has seen a 47% return over the past year and recently surpassed Q1 2026 earnings and revenue expectations.

feed.title: TBHC–Bed Bath & Beyond (BBBY) all-stock merger offers 0.1993 BBBY shares
feed.summary: Bed Bath & Beyond, Inc. (BBBY) plans to acquire The Brand House Collective, Inc. (TBHC) in an all-stock merger, where each TBHC share will convert into 0.1993 shares of BBBY common stock. This merger aims to integrate TBHC's physical retail footprint and operational expertise with BBBY's e-commerce platform, leveraging BBBY-owned brands like Bed Bath & Beyond Home and buybuy BABY. The TBHC board unanimously recommends the merger, which is subject to shareholder approval and is expected to close in Q1 2026.

feed.title: NVIDIA Overtakes Apple: ETFs to Tap the Incredible Growth Story
feed.summary: NVIDIA has surpassed Apple in market capitalization, reaching over $3 trillion, driven by the AI frenzy and strong earnings. The company's upcoming 10-for-1 stock split and new AI chip platforms are expected to further boost its growth. Investors can gain exposure to NVIDIA's incredible growth story through several ETFs that have significant allocations to the chipmaker.

feed.title: Ares Capital Corporation Announces Tax Reporting Information for Calendar Year 2025
feed.summary: Ares Capital Corporation has announced its tax reporting information for common stock distributions made in calendar year 2025. The company detailed the ordinary income, qualified dividend income eligibility, and interest-related dividends per share for each quarterly distribution. Stockholders are advised to consult their tax advisors for personalized guidance.

feed.title: Freeport-McMoRan stock price sinks 7.5% as copper tumbles from record highs — what’s next for FCX
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan's (FCX) stock price dropped 7.5% to $60.23 after copper and precious metals tumbled from record highs. This reversal came as traders took profits and the dollar firmed, with investors bracing for lunar new year shutdowns and potential shifts in US trade policy. The outlook for FCX heavily depends on whether copper's pullback continues, with upcoming US economic data expected to influence market direction.

feed.title: Parker-Hannifin Lifts Outlook After Record Quarter
feed.summary: Parker-Hannifin (PH) reported record Q2 results, with strong sales, margin expansion, and EPS acceleration, leading to a raised full-year guidance. The company’s aerospace segment was a key growth driver, and it expects further benefits from the strategic acquisition of Filtration Group. Despite some weaknesses in transportation and agriculture, management expressed confidence in continued profitable growth fueled by operational execution and a robust backlog.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Gary Geisel Sells Shares of M&T Bank Corp
feed.summary: Gary Geisel, a Director at M&T Bank Corp, sold 887 shares of the company on January 28, 2026, reducing his total ownership to 16,446.157 shares. This transaction follows a pattern of 12 insider sells and no buys over the past year for M&T Bank Corp. Shares were trading at $215.79, indicating the stock is modestly overvalued according to GuruFocus's GF Value.

feed.title: Energizer Holdings declares quarterly dividend of $0.30 per share
feed.summary: Energizer Holdings, Inc. announced a quarterly dividend of $0.30 per share, offering a 5.5% dividend yield, with payment scheduled for March 11, 2026. The company's stock is currently trading at a low P/E ratio of 6.56, suggesting it may be undervalued according to InvestingPro analysis. This dividend declaration comes amidst recent news including UBS maintaining a Neutral rating but lowering its price target, and Moody's changing Energizer's outlook to negative due to concerns about high leverage.

feed.title: Western Digital (WDC) Earnings Call Highlights Cloud Power
feed.summary: Western Digital's earnings call revealed strong Q2 performance with revenue surging 25% year-over-year to $3.0 billion and non-GAAP diluted EPS rising 78% to $2.13, both exceeding guidance. This growth was primarily driven by robust demand from cloud customers, accounting for 89% of total revenue, and the rapid adoption of high-capacity ePMR drives. The company also demonstrated significant margin expansion and strong free cash flow, while highlighting deep contract visibility with major customers and an ambitious technology roadmap.

feed.title: International Business Machines (NYSE:IBM) Director David Farr Acquires 1,000 Shares
feed.summary: International Business Machines (NYSE:IBM) Director David Farr recently acquired 1,000 shares of the company's stock at $304.00 per share, increasing his total holdings to 9,258 shares. This purchase follows IBM's strong Q4 earnings, which surpassed analyst expectations in both EPS and revenue, driven by AI and software growth. The company also announced a quarterly dividend and received positive analyst ratings, with an average target price of $330.07.

feed.title: Energizer Declares $0.30 Dividend Per Share
feed.summary: Energizer Holdings, Inc. announced a dividend of $0.30 per share, payable on March 11, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 18, 2026. This declaration reflects the company's strong cash flow and profitability, aiming to boost investor confidence and reinforce its commitment to shareholder returns within a long-term growth strategy. Energizer, a major manufacturer of batteries and automotive care products, maintains a strong market presence with well-known brands.

feed.title: Mantua Tractor Supply Sets Early February Opening Date
feed.summary: A new Tractor Supply store in Mantua, New Jersey, located on Route 45, is scheduled to open on Saturday, February 7, 2026. This large-format retailer, developed on the former site of Gino’s Driving Range, will offer a wide range of products for outdoor, farming, ranching, and pet-owning lifestyles. The opening is expected to be a soft launch, with a grand opening event potentially coming later.

feed.title: Avis to move Zipcar's HQ out of Boston, lay off staff
feed.summary: Avis is closing Zipcar's separate headquarters in Boston, leading to 126 layoffs. Zipcar, founded in Cambridge in 1999, was acquired by Avis in 2013 and will no longer maintain its distinct Boston office. This move shifts operations away from the car-sharing company's original base.

feed.title: Energizer Holdings to pay $0.30 per share dividend in March
feed.summary: Energizer Holdings (NYSE: ENR) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.30 per share, which will be payable on March 11, 2026. Shareholders of record as of the close of business on February 18, 2026, will be eligible to receive this dividend. The announcement outlines the key dates for the distribution, confirming a positive cash flow event for eligible shareholders.

feed.title: Check-Cap Files MBody AI Financials as It Targets First-Half 2026 Merger Closing
feed.summary: Check-Cap has filed detailed audited and pro forma financial statements for MBody AI, crucial for their anticipated merger. The companies aim to finalize the merger in the first half of 2026, though they caution that the completion is subject to several conditions, including securing sufficient capital and regulatory approvals. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, assesses MBAI as an "Underperform" due to significant financial challenges despite a strong equity position.

feed.title: ENERGIZER HOLDINGS, INC. DECLARES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND ON ITS COMMON STOCK
feed.summary: Energizer Holdings, Inc. announced a quarterly dividend of $0.30 per share on its common stock. The dividend is payable on March 11, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 18, 2026. Energizer Holdings, headquartered in St. Louis, Missouri, is a global manufacturer and distributor of primary batteries, portable lights, and auto care products.

feed.title: Weyerhaeuser Co. (NYSE:WY) Reports Mixed Q4 2025 Results, Beats on EPS but Misses on Revenue
feed.summary: Weyerhaeuser Co. (NYSE:WY) reported mixed financial results for Q4 2025, beating EPS expectations with a -$0.09 loss per share against an estimated -$0.13, but missing revenue forecasts at $1.54 billion compared to the anticipated $1.61 billion. Despite the revenue miss, the company's shares rose in after-market trading, likely due to effective cost management leading to a narrower-than-expected loss. Analysts project $7.31 billion in revenue for the full year 2026 and $1.69 billion for Q1 2026, indicating expectations for improved sales.

feed.title: DEFSEC Technologies Files Restated Interim Financial Statements
feed.summary: DEFSEC Technologies Inc. has voluntarily filed restated unaudited condensed consolidated interim financial statements for the three and nine months ended June 30, 2025 and 2024. The restatements address errors in the initial measurement of right-of-use assets and lease liabilities, as well as lease-related prepayments, stemming from a lease entered into in June 2025. The company stated that these changes did not impact cash balance, revenues, expenses, or cash flows, and resulted in a $0.2 million increase in working capital as of June 30, 2025.

feed.title: This Tech Stock Just Crashed to a 52-Week Low: Should You Buy the Dip?
feed.summary: Commvault Systems (NASDAQ: CVLT) stock dropped significantly after its fiscal third-quarter earnings report, despite beating revenue and earnings estimates, reaching a 52-week low. The steep decline is attributed to its high valuation and an outlook that, while strong, fell slightly below analysts' elevated expectations. Despite the market's reaction, analysts still overwhelmingly rate Commvault as a buy with a median price target suggesting a strong rebound.

feed.title: Sierra Bancorp (NASDAQ:BSRR) Plans Quarterly Dividend of $0.26
feed.summary: Sierra Bancorp (NASDAQ:BSRR) has announced an increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.26 per share, a 4.0% increase from its previous dividend. The ex-dividend date is set for February 9th, with payment on February 17th. The dividend is well-covered by earnings, with a payout ratio of 31.9% and an expected future payout ratio of 32.8% based on analyst forecasts.

feed.title: Wintrust Financial EVP Hahnfeld sells $45,665 in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Jeffrey D. Hahnfeld, EVP-CONTROLLER & CHIEF ACC OFF at Wintrust Financial Corp, sold 314 shares of common stock for $45,665 on January 27, 2026. This transaction follows other positive news for Wintrust, including a 10% increase in its quarterly dividend and several analyst firms raising their price targets due to strong operational performance and growth prospects.

feed.title: Tilray Brands (NASDAQ:TLRY) Shares Down 2.9% - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: Tilray Brands (NASDAQ:TLRY) shares recently dropped 2.9%, trading below their 50-day and 200-day moving averages. Analysts have a "Reduce" consensus rating with an average price target of $13.33, influenced by recent price target cuts and reiterations of "sell" ratings. The company reported weak Q1 earnings, missing EPS estimates, but revenue slightly exceeded expectations.

feed.title: Lam Research stock slips nearly 6% after-hours as chip-tool trade cools — what’s driving LRCX now
feed.summary: Lam Research stock (LRCX) dipped nearly 6% after-hours despite an optimistic outlook due to broader market jitters following President Trump's Fed chair nomination and mixed earnings reports. The decline in chip-tool stocks, including LRCX, is being watched as a barometer for continued investment in new chip manufacturing equipment, which has been fueled by AI demand. Despite strong guidance for Q3 and a record year driven by demand for complex chip designs, the company’s vulnerability to shifts in regional demand, particularly from China, remains a factor.

feed.title: Amprius technologies (AMPX) CTO sells $476k in stock
feed.summary: Amprius Technologies' (AMPX) Chief Technology Officer, Stefan Constantin Ionel, sold 39,690 shares of common stock for approximately $476,351 on January 28, 2026, while also exercising options to acquire the same number of shares. This transaction follows other significant developments for the company, including a $100 million equity offering and a leadership transition with Tom Stepien becoming CEO and current CEO Dr. Kang Sun moving to an Executive Advisor role. Analyst firms Oppenheimer and Needham have both maintained positive ratings for Amprius, highlighting its strategic adjustments and strong market presence in the unmanned aerial systems battery market.

feed.title: PulteGroup execs expects fewer home sales in 2026 after underwhelming 2025
feed.summary: PulteGroup, an Atlanta-based homebuilder, is forecasting a decrease in home sales for 2026 compared to 2025. This expectation comes after what appears to be an underwhelming performance in 2025. The company is one of the largest homebuilders in the nation.

feed.title: Lawmakers to Xcel: Rethink wildfire shutoffs
feed.summary: Colorado lawmakers expressed significant skepticism regarding Xcel Energy's strategy of preemptive power shutoffs to prevent wildfires, fearing these outages could become a problematic default. Xcel president Robert Kenney stated the company is working on "more surgical" shutoffs and infrastructure hardening but acknowledged the challenges and costs. Lawmakers and local officials highlighted widespread frustration over communication, economic impact on businesses, and questioned if shutoffs were more for litigation avoidance than public safety.

feed.title: Church & Dwight Co., Inc. (NYSE:CHD) Raises Dividend to $0.31 Per Share
feed.summary: Church & Dwight Co., Inc. (NYSE:CHD) recently announced a quarterly dividend increase to $0.3075 per share, marking a 4.2% rise and continuing its 29-year streak of dividend increases. The company's dividend payout ratio of 31.6% is well-covered by earnings, with analysts projecting it to remain around 29.6% next year. This announcement followed a strong Q4 performance where the company beat EPS estimates and reported a 3.9% year-over-year revenue increase, with guidance set for FY2026 EPS.

feed.title: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ:REGN) Raises Dividend to $0.94 Per Share
feed.summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:REGN) has announced a quarterly dividend increase to $0.94 per share, a 6.8% rise from its previous $0.88. This dividend, payable on March 5th to shareholders of record by February 20th, suggests a dividend yield of approximately 0.5% and is comfortably covered by earnings, with a low payout ratio of 8.9%. The company also reported strong quarterly earnings, surpassing analyst expectations with EPS of $11.44 and revenue of $3.88 billion.

feed.title: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) Trading Down 4.3% - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) saw its stock price fall by 4.3% on Friday, trading at $141.79 on lower-than-average volume. Despite this, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average price target of $164.44, following the company's recent earnings report which beat estimates with $0.75 EPS and $2.31 billion in revenue. However, insider selling has been noted, with 216,464 shares sold by insiders in the last 90 days.

feed.title: Marathon Petroleum sets virtual-only shareholder meeting for April 29
feed.summary: Marathon Petroleum (NYSE: MPC) announced its 2026 annual meeting of shareholders will be held virtually on April 29, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET. Shareholders of record as of March 3, 2026, are eligible to vote, with details on accessing the meeting provided in the proxy statement. This announcement is part of the company's recent governance updates, following changes in chairman and CFO positions in late 2025.

feed.title: Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ:SMCI) Shares Down 3.4% - Here's Why
feed.summary: Shares of Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ:SMCI) fell 3.4% on Friday, trading at $29.11, following a significant miss on quarterly earnings and revenue expectations. The company reported EPS of $0.35 against an expected $0.46, and revenue of $5.02 billion versus the $6.48 billion consensus. Analyst ratings for SMCI are mixed, with an average "Hold" rating and price targets ranging from $26 to $60.

feed.title: CMG $39.16 (Chipotle Mexican Grill NYSE) 30 Jan 2026: earnings Feb 3 may reset targets
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG) is set to report earnings on February 3, 2026, which is expected to be a significant catalyst for its stock. Analysts will be closely watching metrics such as margins, digital sales, and traffic trends, with a focus on potential EPS pressure and mixed guidance. Despite a "BUY" rating from Meyka AI, the stock currently trades at a premium valuation, and its future performance will heavily depend on the upcoming earnings report and management's guidance.

feed.title: The More Defensive Way to Invest in Restaurant Stocks
feed.summary: Investing in franchise-based quick-service restaurants (QSRs) offers a more defensive approach to the restaurant industry, especially after a challenging 2025. This model benefits from high-margin royalty revenue, low capital requirements, and reduced operational risk, leading to reliable cash flow for shareholders. Companies like McDonald's, Yum! Brands, Restaurant Brands International, and Wingstop exemplify this strategy, providing stability, growth potential, and dividends for various investor profiles.

feed.title: Franklin Resources Inc (BEN) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Inflows and Strategic Growth Amid Market Challenges
feed.summary: Franklin Resources Inc (BEN) reported strong Q1 2026 earnings, featuring record long-term inflows of $118.6 billion and a total AUM of $1.68 trillion. The company achieved positive net flows across various strategies, including a significant expansion in its private credit platform and ETF growth. Despite some fixed income outflows and a modest decline in investment performance for certain U.S. equity strategies, Franklin Resources is on track to meet its $200 million cost savings target and aims for operating margins exceeding 30% by fiscal 2027.

feed.title: How Many Food Brands Does General Mills Own?
feed.summary: General Mills, originally a flour mill, has grown into a major food manufacturer housing 40 major brands across various food genres. Beyond its well-known cereals like Cheerios and Kix, it owns brands including Betty Crocker and Bugle, and has expanded through acquisitions into pet food with Blue Buffalo, and historically into the restaurant industry with Red Lobster and Olive Garden. The company’s long history includes producing Gold Medal Flour, creating Betty Crocker, and developing cereal manufacturing technologies.

feed.title: CEO Mike Wirth: Chevron could triple how much Venezuelan oil it processes in US refineries
feed.summary: During recent earnings calls, the CEOs of Chevron and Exxon discussed their companies' potential roles in new investments in Venezuela. Chevron's CEO, Mike Wirth, indicated that the company could significantly increase the amount of Venezuelan oil processed in its U.S. refineries. This comes as Houston oil companies explore opportunities in the Venezuelan market.

feed.title: Best Buy’s Stock Tries To Reboot: Can BBY Turn A Choppy Tape Into A Comeback Trade?
feed.summary: Best Buy's stock (BBY) is trading sideways as investors weigh cautious consumer spending against strong cash generation and AI/services-driven plans. Despite recent choppiness, analyst calls, resilient margins, and an attractive dividend yield are keeping optimists engaged. The company's one-year performance has shown a 10-15% gain before dividends, with total returns closer to the mid-teens percentage when dividends are included, highlighting that patience has been rewarded despite stock volatility.

feed.title: Braskem Board Expands Executive Authority for 2026 Financing Operations
feed.summary: Braskem S.A.'s Board of Directors has expanded the Executive Board's authority for 2026 financing operations, allowing them to contract loans and other financial transactions up to US$250 million per operation, within a US$10.3 billion gross corporate debt cap. This move aims to streamline financial decision-making and enhance flexibility in capital structure management. Despite an improved EBITDA and liquidity, TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates BAK as Neutral due to significant financial challenges like high leverage and declining profitability, alongside ongoing industry pressures.

feed.title: AN2 Therapeutics adjusts leadership roles and executive compensation
feed.summary: AN2 Therapeutics (ANTX) has appointed Sarah Williams as Principal Accounting Officer with an increased salary, effective February 1, 2026. Simultaneously, CFO Lucy Day's salary will be reduced as part of the company's cost-saving efforts, while her other employment terms remain largely unchanged. The company's stock currently holds a "Hold" rating with a $1.00 price target based on analyst forecasts.

feed.title: Marathon Petroleum Corporation Announces Quarterly Dividend, Payable on March 10, 2026
feed.summary: Marathon Petroleum Corporation has announced a quarterly dividend of $1.00 per share on common stock. This dividend is scheduled to be paid on March 10, 2026, to shareholders who are on record as of February 18, 2026. The announcement was made by the company's board of directors.

feed.title: CoreWeave CEO on the Company's Relationship With Nvidia
feed.summary: CoreWeave CEO Mike Intrator discussed the company's strong partnership with Nvidia, calling them an "absolutely incredible partner." The interview was conducted on January 21, 2026, during the World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland.

feed.title: General Dynamics wins $255 million Navy contract for submarine systems
feed.summary: General Dynamics Mission Systems has secured a $255.1 million hybrid contract from the U.S. Navy for strategic weapon system fire control subsystem work, with additional options worth $485.3 million. This contract includes support for a Foreign Military Sale to the United Kingdom. The company will provide various services including development, production, and modernization for U.S. and UK submarine fleets, with most of the work performed in Pittsfield, Massachusetts, extending through June 2033.

feed.title: Central Pacific Financial Corp: Quiet Ticker, Loud Signals From Wall Street And The Tape
feed.summary: Central Pacific Financial Corp (CPF) has shown quiet trading recently but delivered a strong 19-20% gain over the past year, prompting a re-evaluation by investors and analysts. Despite this rally, Wall Street maintains a cautious "Hold" stance, citing macroeconomic headwinds and sector-wide uncertainties for regional banks. The article suggests CPF is at an inflection point, with future performance depending on interest rates, credit quality, and capital deployment strategies.

feed.title: Is Vertex Pharmaceuticals (VRTX) Pricing Reflect Its DCF Discount And Premium P/E Ratio
feed.summary: This article analyzes Vertex Pharmaceuticals (VRTX) using two valuation methods: Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) and Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio. The DCF model suggests Vertex is undervalued by 36.2% with an estimated intrinsic value of $736.31 per share, compared to its current price of $469.90. However, its P/E ratio of 32.44x is slightly above Simply Wall St's "Fair Ratio" of 29.09x, indicating it might be overvalued by that metric.

feed.title: UWM Holdings, Two Harbors filed US premerger notification forms Jan. 26
feed.summary: UWM Holdings Corp. and Two Harbors Investment Corp. each filed Hart-Scott-Rodino Act premerger notification forms with US regulators on January 26. These filings initiated a 30-day waiting period for the Federal Trade Commission and US Department of Justice to review the deal. This period allows regulators to clear the transaction, request additional information, or for the companies to withdraw and refile their paperwork.

feed.title: Boeing lands major 737 Max order from Air India
feed.summary: Boeing has secured a significant order for 30 737 Max jets from Air India, adding to several large deals for the jet maker this month as it continues its recovery. The company also anticipates federal certification for its Max 10 jet later this year.

feed.title: Pepsi Super Bowl Challenge Puts Coca Cola Zero Sugar Story In Focus
feed.summary: Pepsi is launching a Super Bowl ad campaign that directly compares Pepsi Zero Sugar with Coca-Cola's Coke Zero, intensifying the long-standing cola rivalry in the zero-sugar segment. This move places Coca-Cola's brand equity and zero-sugar offerings under increased scrutiny. For investors, the focus shifts to how this challenge might influence Coca-Cola's future marketing strategies, particularly regarding taste, health perceptions, and pricing for its zero-sugar products, and whether it will respond with dedicated campaigns or leverage its broader portfolio resilience.

feed.title: International Business Machines Insider Bought Shares Worth $304,000, According to a Recent SEC Filing
feed.summary: An insider at International Business Machines (IBM) recently purchased shares valued at $304,000, as detailed in a recent SEC filing. The article also briefly mentions Unity Software's Q4 financial results, reporting revenue of $609 million which beat estimates, and a quarterly loss of 66 cents per share. However, the connection between Unity Software's results and IBM's insider buying is not explicitly stated.

feed.title: DaVita Q4 2025 earnings preview
feed.summary: This article provides an earnings preview for DaVita's Q4 2025 financial results. Details regarding expected performance and key areas of focus for the upcoming earnings report would typically be found in such a preview. Further financial specifics are anticipated.
